backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a fashion e-commerce backend with product CRUD (admin-only) and user profile management, using role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a promotional KurtaSuitProductSection on the ProductBrowse page, linking to an Amazon URL, with references to the relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, page, hook, and configuration file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fashion Forum SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for product browse, product detail, and admin pages, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a link back to the product browse page for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AttackOnTitanGal: Swipeable image gallery component for Attack on Titan T-shirt product images, supporting touch/mouse swipe navigation, loading states, and a Meesho external link button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of pill-shaped buttons for filtering products by category, highlighting the currently selected category.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Displays a clickable category thumbnail that expands/collapses a grid of product images, with loading skeletons and error states for each image.
frontend/src/components/KurtaSuitProduct: Renders a single product image (Pink Kurta Suit) with a lazy-loaded image and a 'Lookout' button linking to an Amazon affiliate URL.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header containing the site logo, user profile display, admin link, Pinterest profile link, and login/logout button, plus a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: A loading indicator component that shows a spinner during loading and switches to a timeout alert with an optional retry button after a configurable delay.
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Displays a product image that links to a Meesho affiliate URL, with a hover overlay showing 'Look Out →' and a loading spinner while the image loads.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A card component that displays a product's image, name, category badge, and price, linking to the product detail page with a Pinterest pin indicator if applicable.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: A reusable form for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID, using react-hook-form for validation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name to create a profile, blocking interaction until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: A swipeable image gallery component supporting touch and mouse drag navigation, with loading states, error fallback, navigation arrows, and a Meesho external link button.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of ABREXO watch product images with lazy loading and a Meesho affiliate link button using a lookout icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook that manages image loading state with retry logic and fallback to a placeholder image on repeated failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products and user profile data, using the backend actor and showing toast notifications on mutation results.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that tracks touch and mouse drag events to detect left/right swipe gestures beyond a configurable threshold and trigger corresponding callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm neutral fashion e-commerce color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin-only page for managing products, providing a table view with add, edit, and delete functionality via dialogs, guarded by an admin permission check.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page that displays filterable product cards by category alongside promotional sections including swipeable galleries, watch/kurta/Meesho product sections, and an Attack on Titan gallery.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that fetches and displays a single product by ID (from URL params), showing its image, badges, Pinterest link, and external purchase button, with loading/error/not-found states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, Inter/Playfair Display fonts, custom border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for the Fashion Forum app, including a completed feature adding a pink kurta suit image with a 'Lookout' button linking to an Amazon product on the ProductBrowse page, and a pending similar feature request.
